summary.problem: Tool mode should support explicit response format selection for internal integrations.
summary.proposed_capability: Expose a low-risk backend configuration path for response format tool mode.
summary.why_now: The changelog feature unblocks a cleaner internal API surface with minimal blast radius.
assumptions: The feature remains behind a flag during rollout.
non_goals: No user-facing UI changes are included in this ticket.

acceptance_criteria.description: Internal callers can opt into the new response format tool mode.

open_questions.question: Should we broaden golden-set coverage before rollout?

factors.name: user_visible
factors.notes: The change is visible only to internal callers.

factors.name: low_test_coverage_area
factors.notes: The route has lighter than ideal existing coverage.

relevance.rationale: The feature is relevant to the internal API roadmap and can ship through the fast lane.
